name: @narada2/agent-web-ui

scripts.test: node --test test/agent-web-ui.test.mjs test/agent-web-ui-projection.test.mjs test/agent-web-ui-protocol.test.mjs && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.test:browser: pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:projection
scripts.test:runtime:slash-commands: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.js test/e2e/live-slash-smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:live:external-nars-input: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && pnpm --dir ../../../mcp-surfaces --filter @narada2/nars-session-mcp build && pnpm --filter @narada2/cloudflare-nars-projection build && node test/live-launcher-affordance-e2e.mjs --scenario external_input
scripts.test:live:replay-reconnect: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && pnpm --dir ../../../mcp-surfaces --filter @narada2/nars-session-mcp build && node test/live-launcher-affordance-e2e.mjs --scenario replay_reconnect
scripts.test:live:intelligence-reconfiguration: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && node test/live-launcher-affordance-e2e.mjs --scenario intelligence_reconfiguration
scripts.test:live:full-router-nars-provider: pnpm --filter @narada2/operator-router build && pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && node test/full-live-router-nars-provider-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:browser
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.js
scripts.test:projection: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.projection.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.js --ui

description: Production Agent Web UI browser surface for one NARS session
